<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Sōma Nomaoi]][[ja:相馬野馬追]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Sōma Nomaoi]][[ja:相馬野馬追]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:相馬野馬追]]

'''Soma-Nomaoi''' is an ancient Japanese festival held in Minamisoma and Soma City of Fukushima Prefecture. It has been celebrated for over a thousand years and features mounted warriors wearing armor, swords, and flag-designated weapons, galloping across fields to recreate a battle scene from the past.<ref>https://www.japan.travel/en/spot/1740/</ref><ref>https://blog.japanwondertravel.com/soma-nomaoi-festival-in-fukushima-prefecture-34330</ref><ref>https://web-japan.org/atlas/festivals/fes06.html</ref>
{{translated page|ja|相馬野馬追|version=103805651|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:相馬野馬追]]
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{Commons category|Sōma Nomaoi}}
{{wikidata link|Q11582543}}
[[Category:Festivals in Fukushima Prefecture]]
[[Category:Hamadori Region]]
[[Category:Horses in culture]]
[[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]]
[[Category:Minamisōma]]
[[Category:Shinto festivals]]
[[Category:Shinto_festivals]]
[[Category:Sōma clan]]
[[Category:Sōma Shrines]]
[[Category:Sōma, Fukushima]]
[[Category:Sōma-Nakamura Domain]]
[[Category:Taira no Masakado]]
[[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
